title: MineCollapse
description: MineCollapse is a standalone port of the rock collapse and landslide mechanics from TerraFirmaCraft.
body:
# MineCollapse

MineCollapse is a standalone port of the rock collapse and landslide mechanics from [TerraFirmaCraft](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/terrafirmacraft).
Because TerraFirmaCraft is a total conversion mod that changes many aspects of the game, it's hard to integrate with other mods.
MineCollapse, on the other hand, is easier to integrate, since it is more limited in scope, and pairs nicely with mods like [Geolosys](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/geolosys).
You can read more about the collapse mechanic in the [TFC Field Guide](https://terrafirmacraft.github.io/Field-Guide/en_us/mechanics/support_beams.html)
or watch [a YouTube video about it](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1KgwEexxGNI).
